# Adequate empirical work; novelty claim is borderline

## Synopsis
R2 view: empirical results check out, but novelty vs recent work is not fully demonstrated.

## Summary
The paper runs experiments on X and reports improvements.

## Strengths
- Reasonable empirical setup
- Clear writing

## Weaknesses
- [major] Missing baseline ABC on benchmark foo (§4.2)
- [major] Novelty vs 2025 concurrent work is not defended (§2)

## References
None.

## Recommendation
weak reject
Justification: 0 critical, 2 major, 0 minor. Missing baseline and unclear novelty vs concurrent work together push below the oral bar.
